blocks.title: A small site, made well.
blocks.subtitle: Built on the website-framework. Edit me at /admin — no code, no deploys, just save.

items.title: Block-based pages
items.body: Every page is JSON. Each block renders itself. Edit content without touching code.

items.title: Admin panel
items.body: Visit /admin to add, edit, and reorder blocks. Changes save back to JSON and commit on rebuild.

items.title: Themeable
items.body: Five built-in themes (editorial / studio / tech / warm / monochrome). Switch in site.json.

blocks.quote: The best way to predict the future is to render it.
blocks.author: Alan Kay (probably)
